message:
Enhance fwc CLI: audit reporting, batch operations, MCP server, and diagnostic tooling

audit.rs: expanded audit report generation with additional formatting
and analysis capabilities (~104 lines changed).

batch.rs + batch_file.rs: improved batch operation execution with
better error reporting and file-based batch input handling refinements.

serve_mcp.rs: significant MCP server improvements (~127 lines) for
the agent-facing connector serving pathway.

doctor.rs: enhanced diagnostic checks and health reporting (~65 lines).

pipe.rs: improved pipeline execution and data flow handling (~42 lines).

history.rs: expanded operation history tracking and display.

search.rs: refined search functionality across connector operations.

schema_nav.rs: improved schema navigation and introspection UX.

event_stream.rs: enhanced event streaming display and filtering.

Additional: auth_status display improvements, credential_store
formatting, format_table output refinements, json_diff comparison
logic, pipeline_recipes templates, routing dispatch updates,
secretless credential handling, session management, and validate
command improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
